message:
feat(conformance): add recovery flow conformance vectors

16 new golden vectors covering FCP V3 recovery semantics:
- ReplayWindow: accept/reject/reorder/gap/boundary/seq-zero (8 tests)
- SessionReplayPolicy: normative defaults, conservative thresholds, equality (3 tests)
- TimePolicy: defaults verification (1 test)
- ZoneCheckpoint: freshness comparison, quorum signatures, JSON recovery roundtrip (3 tests)
- Integration: replay window sized from policy reorder window (1 test)

Extends P3.5 conformance coverage for §9.7.3 (Session Replay and Rekey)
and §6.5 (Zone Checkpoints).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
